# Geotecnia1 — Joao Pessoa

> Geotechnical engineering services in Joao Pessoa, Brasil.

- [Densidade Cone Areia](https://joao-pessoa.geotecnia1.org/densidade-cone-areia/)

- Website: https://joao-pessoa.geotecnia1.org/

## About
This site provides geotechnical engineering services in Joao Pessoa, Brasil.
Compliant with local and international standards (ASTM, ISO, country-specific norms).
